title: The FilaskPack
description: The Texture Pack I Use In My Youtube Videos! Dark GUI, Renamed Items, Smaller Handhelds And More!
body:
# The FilaskPack


The FilaskPack! The Recourse Pack I Use In All Of My Videos!

[Subscribe To Me On Youtube](https://www.youtube.com/@Filaskon)!

[Check Out The CurseForge Version](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/the-filaskpack)!

Scroll Down For A List Of Features!




## Features

Dark GUI (VanillaTweaks)

FullBright (VanillaTweaks)

Technoblade Pigs (VanillaTweaks (but modified))

Better Item Names (For English US And English GB)

Smaller HandHelds

Better Splash-Texts

Better Grass

Short Weapons (Short Swords From VanillaTweaks)

RickRoll Painting     ![RickRoll Painting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/411d988d8201ecf4b342c390a11b3b150e8883a2_0.webp)

Minecraft Movie Painting     ![Minecraft Movie Painting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c351f40e699a84b8c0a8a953f608ca90f99e7e0d_0.webp)

Rotating Skull On The Burning Skull Painting (VanillaTweaks)

Clean Leather Armour (VanillaTweaks)

And, Of Course, Some Other Texture Changes




### Credits:

Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/

All Other Textures By Me: https://www.youtube.com/@Filaskon
